channel.title: future on Codin Moldovanu
channel.description: Recent content in future on Codin Moldovanu

item.title: Decisions, decisions
item.description: Who loves to decide, except maybe judges, between things. You can always choose one or the other, never both, and regardless of your decisions there’s one path you’ll never know – and this is how you end up with “what-ifs”, letting a past decision creep into your brain and flowering into doubt, regret and other thoughts and feelings that no one likes to experience. You’ll always find excuses for yourself and for your decision, you’ll try to rationalize them as much as you can, despite them maybe not being the rational decisions you’d objectively choose if confronted with them removed from the context.
